failed.message:
smoke command failed (docker, exit 125): command -v 'juicebox' >/dev/null
stdout: 
stderr: Unable to find image 'ghcr.io/taffish/juicebox:3.1.4-r1' locally
docker: Error response from daemon: Head "https://ghcr.io/v2/taffish/juicebox/manifests/3.1.4-r1": Get "https://ghcr.io/token?scope=repository%3Ataffish%2Fjuicebox%3Apull&service=ghcr.io": context deadline exceeded (Client.Timeout exceeded while awaiting headers)

Run 'docker run --help' for more information

rejected.reason: Immutable release has invalid smoke commands that reuse a temp directory across isolated smoke containers; fixed by v1.3.3-r2.
